basics.name: Atharva Ravindra Tare
basics.title: Electrical Engineering Student | Full-Stack Developer | Graphic Designer
basics.summary: Final Year B.Tech EE @ SBJ Institute of Technology, Nagpur | IEEE Design Head | Freelancer | NSS Coordinator

experience.company: IEEE S. B. Jain Student Branch
bullets: Leading the creative direction for campus-wide technical events and workshops.
Managing a team of student designers to produce high-impact digital and print assets.
Spearheading brand identity for IEEE events reaching 500+ students.
impact_highlights: Led creative direction for campus-wide technical events
Managed a team of student designers

internships.company: EV Power Train Architect: Design & Simulation
bullets: Focused on architectural modeling and simulation of electric vehicle drive systems.
Designed and analyzed power train topologies using MATLAB/Simulink.
Studied regenerative braking systems and battery management for EVs.
Completed hands-on training in computer networking fundamentals.
Configured network protocols, routing, and switching architectures.
Gained proficiency in network security and troubleshooting.
Developed and executed social media marketing campaigns.
Created engaging content for multiple digital platforms.
Analyzed campaign metrics to optimize reach and engagement.

education.institution: S.B. Jain Institute of Technology, Management & Research
education.performance: Academic Performance (CGPA): Sem I: 9.23 | Sem II: 9.27 | Sem III: 9.05 | Sem IV: 9.19 | Sem V: 9.15

software.title: Solar Bharat
software.description: A comprehensive solar energy awareness and calculation platform for India, promoting sustainable energy adoption across the country.
bullets: Built a full-stack web platform for solar energy awareness and adoption in India.
Integrated solar potential calculation tools for different Indian regions.
Designed user-friendly interfaces for energy savings estimation.

software.title: Smart IV Drip Monitoring System
software.description: An IoT-based healthcare solution for real-time intravenous fluid tracking to reduce manual nursing supervision.
bullets: Designed an IoT-based healthcare solution for real-time IV fluid tracking.
Integrated sensors to automate level detection with buzzer alert system.
Reduced manual nursing supervision needs and improved patient safety protocols.

software.title: Portfolio Website
software.description: This very portfolio — a futuristic, animated personal website built with React, TypeScript, and Framer Motion.
bullets: Designed and developed a premium animated portfolio from scratch.
Implemented particle background, smooth scroll navigation, and responsive design.
Deployed on Vercel with continuous deployment from GitHub.

software.title: Digital Clock
software.description: A sleek digital clock web application with real-time display and modern UI design.
bullets: Built a responsive digital clock with real-time updates.
Implemented modern UI with smooth animations and clean typography.
Used vanilla JavaScript for precise time calculations.

software.title: Netflix Login Page Clone
software.description: A pixel-perfect recreation of the Netflix login page with responsive design and form validation.
bullets: Recreated Netflix's login interface with pixel-perfect accuracy.
Implemented responsive design for all screen sizes.
Added form validation and interactive UI elements.

hardware.title: IoT-Based Temperature Monitoring System
hardware.description: A real-time industrial temperature monitoring system using DHT22 sensor with automated alerts and data logging.
bullets: Designed a real-time temperature and humidity monitoring system using DHT22 sensor.
Implemented threshold-based buzzer alarm for overtemperature protection.
Integrated ESP8266 WiFi module for remote monitoring via web dashboard.
Added 16x2 LCD display for local temperature readout.

hardware.title: Automated Water Pump Controller
hardware.description: An intelligent water level sensing and automatic pump control system for overhead tank management.
bullets: Built an automatic water level detection system using HC-SR04 ultrasonic sensor.
Implemented relay-based motor control to automate pump ON/OFF based on water level.
Added LED indicator panel showing LOW / MEDIUM / FULL tank status.
Designed fail-safe dry-run protection to prevent motor damage.

hardware.title: PWM Solar Charge Controller
hardware.description: A pulse-width modulation based solar charge controller for 12V lead-acid battery with overcharge and deep-discharge protection.
bullets: Designed a PWM-based solar charge controller for 12V battery systems.
Implemented overcharge protection with MOSFET switching at 14.4V cutoff.
Added deep-discharge protection to extend battery lifespan.
Built real-time voltage and current monitoring with 16x2 LCD display.

hardware.title: Smart Energy Meter with IoT Dashboard
hardware.description: A real-time electrical energy consumption monitoring system with IoT-enabled web dashboard for tracking power usage and costs.
bullets: Developed an IoT-based energy metering system measuring real-time voltage, current, and power.
Integrated ACS712 current sensor and ZMPT101B voltage transformer for accurate readings.
Built a ThingSpeak cloud dashboard for remote monitoring and historical data analysis.
Added OLED display for local real-time power consumption readout in kWh.

achievements.title: Winner: Codeflex 2.0 Coding Hackathon
achievements.description: Won the competitive coding hackathon demonstrating problem-solving and coding skills under pressure.

achievements.title: Department Topper: Highest CGPA in Electrical Engineering (1st Year)
achievements.description: Achieved the highest CGPA of 9.27 in the entire Electrical Engineering department during the first academic year.

achievements.title: Technical Speaker: Advantage Vidarbha 2026
achievements.description: Presented technical projects and research at the prestigious Advantage Vidarbha 2026 conference.

achievements.title: IQAC Student Representative
achievements.description: Selected as Electrical Engineering (V Semester) student representative on the college's Internal Quality Assurance Cell.

leadership: Member: Institution of Engineers India (IEI) Student Chapter
